bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the mirror body and pair it with a separate reflection normal component for the light system.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_plane_mirror_static_16x96.png through AssetServer and attach authored pivot guides at the center line.
runtime_notes: The reflection pivot should sit exactly on the geometric center to support 15-degree rotation increments.
Keep the reflective edge brighter than the frame so the usable plane is obvious from a distance.
Do not draw excessive texture noise; mirror readability matters more than surface wear.

context.usage: Grab-and-rotate plane mirror used to redirect light, cut new shadows, and reveal exit routes.

shape.silhouette: Tall narrow mirror with a thin gold frame, bright reflective core, and a small grip bracket at mid height.

acceptance_criteria: The reflective center line remains perfectly straight so reflected beam math can align with the art.
Frame trim stays thin enough that the mirror still reads clearly when rotated at gameplay scale.
